svg.title: leader-k8s Lease architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram for the Kubernetes Lease backend showing electors, Fabric8 client, API Server, Lease resources, annotations, owner tokens, and group slot leases.
svg.text: Native coordination.k8s.io/v1 Lease objects provide a Kubernetes-native leader token and resourceVersion CAS boundary.
github.com/bluetape4k/bluetape4k-leader / leader-k8s - Kubernetes Lease ownership via holderIdentity and resourceVersion updates.
